name: Extract patient referrals from PDFs and route to departments

parameters.content:
## 🏥 Patient Referral Processor

### What this workflow does
1. Watches Google Drive folder for referral letters
2. Extracts patient info, referring MD, diagnosis
3. Identifies urgency level (routine/urgent/stat)
4. Routes to the right department automatically
5. Logs referral to Google Sheets
6. Sends Slack alert with referral details

### Setup steps
1. Get PDF Vector API key from pdfvector.com/api-keys
2. Create a Google Drive folder for referral documents
3. Create a Google Sheet with these columns:
   Patient Name | DOB | Phone | Insurance | Referring MD | MD Practice | Diagnosis | ICD Codes | Urgency | Requested Service | Department | Status | Referral Date | Processed Date
4. Update the folder ID and sheet ID in the nodes
5. Connect your Slack workspace

### Perfect for
- Hospital intake teams
- Referral coordinators
- Specialty clinic staff

parameters.prompt: Extract patient referral letter data as flat fields. patientName, patientDob, patientId, patientPhone, patientEmail, patientAddress, referringPhysicianName, referringPhysicianNpi, referringClinic, referringPhone, referringFax, specialistType, specialistName, referralDate (YYYY-MM-DD), urgency (Routine/Urgent/STAT), icdCodesList (semicolon-separated ICD-10 codes with descriptions), referralReason, clinicalSummary, medicalHistoryList (semicolon-separated relevant history), currentMedicationsList (semicolon-separated medications with doses), allergiesList (semicolon-separated allergies with reactions), recentTestsList (semicolon-separated recent tests with results), insuranceProvider, policyNumber, authorizationNumber, specialInstructions, attachmentsList.

parameters.jsCode:
const data = ($input.first().json?.data || $input.first().json) || {};
const fileName = $('New Referral Letter').item.json.name;
const fileId   = $('New Referral Letter').item.json.id;

const urgency = data.urgency || 'Routine';
let urgencyEmoji = '📋';
if (urgency === 'STAT') urgencyEmoji = '🚨';
else if (urgency === 'Urgent') urgencyEmoji = '⚠️';

return [{ json: {
  patientName:           data.patientName           || 'Unknown',
  patientDob:            data.patientDob            || 'N/A',
  referringPhysicianName: data.referringPhysicianName || 'N/A',
  referringClinic:       data.referringClinic       || 'N/A',
  specialistType:        data.specialistType        || 'N/A',
  specialistName:        data.specialistName        || 'N/A',
  referralDate:          data.referralDate          || 'N/A',
  urgency, urgencyEmoji,
  icdCodesList:          data.icdCodesList          || 'N/A',
  referralReason:        data.referralReason        || 'N/A',
  clinicalSummary:       data.clinicalSummary       || 'N/A',
  currentMedicationsList: data.currentMedicationsList || 'None',
  allergiesList:         data.allergiesList         || 'NKDA',
  recentTestsList:       data.recentTestsList       || 'None',
  insuranceProvider:     data.insuranceProvider     || 'N/A',
  authorizationNumber:   data.authorizationNumber   || 'N/A',
  specialInstructions:   data.specialInstructions   || 'None',
  fileName, fileId,
  processedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
  fileId: fileId,
  dateOfBirth: data.patientDob || "N/A",
  phone: data.patientPhone || "N/A",
  diagnosis: data.icdCodesList || "N/A",
  icdCodes: data.icdCodesList || "N/A",
  requestedService: data.specialistType || "N/A",
  department: data.specialistType || "N/A",
  currentMedications: data.currentMedicationsList || "None",
  allergies: data.allergiesList || "NKDA",
  insuranceId: data.policyNumber || "N/A",
  referringMDName: data.referringPhysicianName || "N/A",
  referringMDPhone: data.referringPhone || "N/A",
  referringMDPractice: data.referringClinic || "N/A",
  urgencyLevel: urgency,
  priorityFlag: urgencyEmoji,
}}];
